case_title: KOAH NAVARRO ET AL VS. THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-12-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KOAH NAVARRO, APRIL NAVARRO'S PETITION FOR ORDER RELIEVING HIM FROM PROVISIONS OF GOVERNMENT CODE 945.4 ON HIS CLAIMS AGAINST THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (GOVERNMENT CODE 946.6), THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF KOAH NAVARRO'S UNOPPOSED "PETITION FOR ORDER RELIEVING HIM FROM PROVISIONS OF GOVERNMENT CODE 945.4 ON HIS CLAIMS AGAINST THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (GOVERNMENT CODE 946.6)" IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Petition For Order Relieving Him From Provisions Of Government Code 945.4 On His Claims Against The City And County Of San Francisco (Government Code 946.6)
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF KOAH NAVARRO, APRIL NAVARRO's Petition For Order Relieving Him From Provisions Of Government Code 945.4 On His Claims Against The City And County Of San Francisco (Government Code 946.6).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Koah Navarro's unopposed "petition for order relieving him from provisions of Government Code 945.4 on his claims against the City and County of San Francisco (Government Code 946.6)" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported.(302/RBU)
